candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash line, preferred over cash flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash agrees conceptually, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not period-end balance sheet cash.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as requested.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet proxy for short-term debt/current borrowings; lease liabilities are separately disclosed, so this likely captures non-lease current debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Perfect semantic match for STD, but no usable reported values are shown in preview.
Interest payable is not debt principal, so it should be excluded from STD.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist. 'Current lease liabilities' is reported separately, so 'Current financial liabilities' is the best non-lease short-term debt measure and avoids including leases.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact total/net PPE line; preferred over component gross/accumulated depreciation lines and over right-of-use assets.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a clean reported PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets, Gross
candidates.why: ROU assets are lease-related and not preferred when a clean total PPE line exists.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clean reported total/net PPE line.

candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow / net cash from operating activities.
